hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams centralize wallet and transaction risk alerts to streamline screening, route cases, and preserve audit evidence within a unified workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: VASP compliance teams face slow review cycles when transaction risk signals and wallet screening outputs remain isolated across multiple providers. This fragmentation creates gaps in traceability and complicates the linkage between alerts, customers, and cases, increasing manual workload and audit challenges.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates wallet risk, transaction signals, provider outputs and customer data into one workflow that routes alerts into structured review cases with full audit evidence for VASP compliance teams.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals, routes alerts into reviews and cases, preserves evidence, and supports defensible compliance decisions within one workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One risk review layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented transaction and wallet risk signals into structured cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence for clearer compliance workflows and operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports compliance teams with controlled workflows, preserved evidence and deployment readiness to meet operational, audit and banking due diligence standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help screen VASP transactions efficiently
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY routes transaction risk into reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports transaction case reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs integrate for transaction screening
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP transaction screening?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects transaction monitoring outputs into structured workflows, linking wallets, transactions, alerts and cases to help VASPs screen and review transaction risk efficiently.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage transaction risk workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes transaction risk alerts into case workflows, enabling consistent policy application, decision logging and escalation within a connected compliance operating layer.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready transaction evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed evidence packages including alerts, provider outputs, decision logs and case histories to support audit readiness and regulatory inspection needs.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing transaction providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYT and screening providers and orchestrates their outputs without replacing underlying systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers by connecting their outputs into structured compliance workflows and audit evidence.
final_title: Connect transaction risk into structured review cases
final_description: See how SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction signals into controlled risk reviews, evidence preservation and case management workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
